title: hosted + witnessed tiers + provenance tape ext
manager: The higher receipt authenticity tiers — `hosted` (the receipt records the execution context) and `witnessed` (per-stimulus provenance signatures, an additive tape extension). Tiers can't be inflated because each is produced by stronger evidence: a witnessed receipt exists only if every input was provenance-signed as it arrived. This is the ladder from "I replayed it myself" up to "an independent witness attested every input as it happened."
cs: `hosted` (execution_context) + `witnessed` (per-stimulus provenance sigs, additive tape extension) tiers; tiers produced by evidence, not asserted; extends the receipt ladder above `replayed` (W10.5).
